results.rendered_html: īdṛkṣa mf(ī)n. (fr. id, neut. of pronom. base 3. i, and dṛkṣa, √dṛś, dropping one d and lengthening the preceding i; cf. tadṛkṣa from tad, &c.), of this aspect, of such a kind, endowed with such qualities, such-like,  VS. ;  Kathās.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
īdṛkṣa (id + dṛkṣa von darś) adj. von diesem Aussehen, derartig, so beschaffen, ein solcher  SIDDH. K. 62,a,12 .  VOP. 26,83 . 84 . īdṛkṣāsa etādṛkṣāsa ū ṣu ṇaḥ sadṛkṣāsaḥ pratidṛkṣāsa etana  VS. 17,84 . (vgl. 81). īdṛkṣarājakāryāṇi bhaveyuḥ  KATHĀS. 15,103 .
— Vgl. die fgg. Ww.

īdṛkṣa -śa a. (kṣī -śī f.), also īdṛś Such, of this kind, of this aspect, endowed with such qualities.
— k n. Such a condition; such occasion.
